title: Serene Pioneers 2
description: The next season of the Serene Pioneers modpack, this time with a heavy focus on providing RPG-like content
body:
Survive the early game and gather resources, explore the tech and magic aspects available in this world, level up your abilities and skills and get stronger gear and spells. Slowly work your way through all the bosses and dimensions, each with their own unique challenges.

The focus this time is to provide a somewhat challenging RPG-like experience while trying to not turn it into a big boring grind. The pack aims to provide players with goals to accomplish over time, as well as giving them tools to build nice and amazing things.

And best of all, all progression is purely optional. Whether you like exploring beautiful biomes, structures and dimensions, defeating challenging dungeons and bosses, Create (pun intended) complex machines and farms, or just build big beautiful structures, this pack will provide something for everyone.

Some of the highlights of this season:
- Serene Seasons, providing a constantly changing atmosphere to the world and influencing the speed at which certain crops crow for each season.
- A custom leveling skill tree using Pufferfish's Skills and its addons. Passively level up your character simply by playing the game.
- Explore the technology side which this time is trying to be closer to the industrial revolution, including Immersive Aircraft and everyones all time favorite, Create and lots of addons.
- But along technology players can also explore the magical side of things, using Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks which provides a lot of spells and challenges, Occultism as well as a few smaller but very charming mods like Theurgy and Nature's Aura.
- Face the challenges provided by the dimensions of The Deep Dark, The Undergarden, Eternal Starlight or befriend the bees in The Bumblezone.
- Challenge the bosses of Iron's Spellsbooks, Bosses of Mass Destruction, Mowzie's Mobs and Cataclysm, grab their loot and craft powerful spells, weapons and armor.
- Explore the beautiful biomes, landscapes and structures provided by Oh the Biomes We've Gone, YUNG's mods and many other mods providing beautiful structures and biomes.
- And many more mods that improve your immersion as well as provide QoL features
